title: Will the Real Terrorist Please Stand Up?
original_title: Will the Real Terrorist Please Stand Up
overview: This documentary chronicles half a century of hostile U.S.-Cuba relations. The film highlights decades of assassinations and sabotage at first backed by Washington, then ignored by the very government that launched a "war against terrorism."
